name: docx_edit_paragraph
description: Rewrite a paragraph's full text; with track_changes on, an automatic word-level diff marks only the changed words as a clean redline. Use docx_replace for small in-paragraph substitutions. Get the anchor from docx_search or docx_read first.

text.description: Replacement text for the whole paragraph.

author.description: Revision author when track_changes is true. Defaults from environment.

diff.description: Summary of the word-level diff, e.g. '~3 words changed'.
